examples: Maybe it's ignorance, naivete, but I really am not.
It is the blend of anxiety, fear, pain, insecurity and naivete that makes each person special.
But I kept going, in my own naivete, fascinated and absorbing perhaps a tenth of what was there.
Mark Bodnick is exhibiting the kind of naivete of those who do not use libraries.
Feel free to chime in and roll your eyes at my naivete if warranted.
